title: huperzia archboldiana
intro: Huperzia archboldiana, also known as the dwarf yellow spleenwort, is a species of liverwort, a type of non-vascular plant. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Huperzia archboldiana include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and improve cognitive function.
